EmailTemplate.description: IFA报名审批通过 - 短信
EmailTemplate.name: IFA Internal Registration Approved SMS
EmailTemplate.subject: 2025 IFA Participation Registration Approval Successful
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
尊敬的 {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
您的IFA展报名已通过审核。展会将于9月5日-9日在德国柏林举行，请尽快自行办理申根签证、预订机票。当地酒店、参展大巴等需求统计将另行通知。
展会系统问题请咨询王芳，wangfang19@hisense.com。
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
Your IFA application is approved. The exhibition will be held in Berlin in Sept.5th to 9th. We kindly remind you to apply for your Schengen visa and book your flights ASAP. You will be informed about hotel reservation and commute bus later.
Any questions for expo system, please contact Ms. Wang Fang for assistance wangfang19@hisense.com.
